title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 182.430 - Vacancies, how filled — no compensation
text:
182.430.  Vacancies, how filled — no compensation. — Vacancies in the board of directors, occasioned by removals, resignation or otherwise, shall be reported to the mayor, and be filled in like manner as original appointments, and no director shall receive compensation as such.
(RSMo 1939 § 14779) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13475; 1919 § 7208; 1909 § 8204
